2605.25612.title: Towards the Connection between Activation Sparsity and Flat Minima
2605.25612.paper_summary: The observation that activation sparsity emerges in MLP blocks of standardly trained Transformers offers an opportunity to drastically reduce computation costs without sacrificing performance. To theoretically explain this phenomenon, existing works have shown that activation sparsity does not result from the data properties or data fitting but from the implicit bias of the training process. However, these connections are obtained with strong assumptions, which cannot be applied to deep models standardly trained with a large number of steps. Different from these works, we find that the flatness of loss landscapes is also closely related to the MLP activation sparsity and can serve as a weaker and naturally emerging assumption standard deep networks. Specifically, we find that 1) the MLP activation sparsity equals a ratio between "augmented flatness" (a weighted sum of flatness measures) and the product of the input norm and activation gradient of the MLP. We empirically find that this ratio decreases during training, leading to sparse activations. 2) We also propose the notion of derivative sparsity, which reduces to activation sparsity under ReLU, but further enables pruning in the backward propagation and is more stable than activation sparsity. With the theoretical findings, we can further encourage activation sparsity by decreasing the numerator and increasing the denominator of the ratio using three methods. These plug-and-play modifications can effectively reduce the ratio and produce sparser activations. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and C4 demonstrate relative improvements of at least 36% on inference sparsity and at least 50% on training sparsity over vanilla Transformers, indicating further potential cost reduction in both inference and training
2605.25612.paper_summary_zh: 觀察到在標準訓練的Transformer的 MLP 區塊中出現的激活稀疏性，提供了一個在不犧牲性能的情況下大幅降低計算成本的機會。為了理論上解釋這一現象，現有的研究表明，激活稀疏性並不是由數據特性或數據擬合所導致，而是來自訓練過程的隱性偏見。然而，這些聯繫是在強假設下獲得的，無法應用於標準訓練的深度模型，這些模型經過大量步驟的訓練。與這些研究不同，我們發現損失景觀的平坦性也與 MLP 激活稀疏性密切相關，並且可以作為標準深度網絡中較弱且自然出現的假設。具體而言，我們發現 1) MLP 激活稀疏性等於“增強平坦性”（平坦性度量的加權總和）與 MLP 的輸入範數和激活梯度的乘積之間的比率。我們實證發現，這一比率在訓練過程中減少，導致稀疏激活。2) 我們還提出了導數稀疏性的概念，這在 ReLU 下簡化為激活稀疏性，但進一步使得在反向傳播中進行修剪成為可能，並且比激活稀疏性更穩定。通過理論發現，我們可以進一步通過使用三種方法來減少比率的分子和增加分母，來鼓勵激活稀疏性。這些即插即用的修改可以有效降低比率並產生更稀疏的激活。在 ImageNet-1K 和 C4 上的實驗顯示，相較於普通Transformer，在推理稀疏性上至少提高了 36%，在訓練稀疏性上至少提高了 50%，這表明在推理和訓練中都有進一步降低成本的潛力。
2605.25612.author: Ze Peng et.al.
2605.25612.authors: Ze Peng, Jian Zhang, Lei Qi, Yang Gao, Yinghuan Shi
